title: Dr. Vaibhav's Pathocity Path Lab – Doctor driven Pathlab

Dr. Vaibhav's Pathocity Path Lab – Doctor driven Pathlab Have any questions? Complete Health Check-Up Fever Package Arthritis Package Diabetes Package . ANC Package PCOD Package Covid Package Cancer Package . Heart Package Menopause Package Fatigue Package Fitness Package . Immunity Package Pre-Marrige Package Pre-Operation Package FAQ Media Corporate Enquiry Contact Us The highest standard of health care Comprehensive Health Check-Up Immunity Package Fever Package Fitness Package Covid Package View More Packages The highest standard of health care Complete Health Check-Up Immunity Package Fever Package Fitness Package Covid Package View More Packages Why Choose Us Doctor Owned NABL Accredited Advanced Tech Home Collection MAMC & AIIMS Doctors Reports Personally Checked Pathocity Laboratory, managed by Dr Vaibhav, provides high quality, accurate and dependable diagnostic services through modern, fully automated technology and facilities. The advisory staff are experienced medical personnel from respected institutions such as AIIMS and MAMC to ensure all the tests performed will be conducted with maximum clinical experience and precision in mind. Our lab is accredited by NABL & ISO, which greatly demonstrates our commitment to quality, consistency and dependability through our commitment to continual improvement in our laboratory operations. Our patient provide home collection service for Blood specimens in Delhi, Gurgaon, Faridabad and Noida; therefore, all of our patients have access to superior quality diagnostic tests. The experienced medical personnel employed by Pathocity Laboratory review and verify the accuracy/completeness of all reports prior to issuance to patients. Upon receipt of their laboratory report, Patients have access to free post-report consultation services which provide assistance in interpreting and understanding their laboratory reports in order for the Patients to be able to make an informed decision regarding their healthcare. Pathocity Laboratory provides preventative health care through offering a wide range of comprehensive health check package options. Our aim is to provide an a smooth, open and patient centred experience to all patients, whilst assuring that every patient is entitled to receive a trustworthy diagnostic service. Our highly-skilled professionals are devoted to delivering a superior quality diagnostic service to our Patients through attention to detail, and a friendly and compassionate manner. Welcome to Our Clinic We are a dedicated team of medical professionals and skilled technicians working hard to provide accurate diagnosis and at the same time never compromising on the patient’s care and comfort. Opening Hours We are committed to provide accurate, reliable and timely medical laboratory services. Monday - Saturday 8 am - 8 pm Sunday 8 am - 6 pm Get in Touch A-3/11, Basement, Opposite HDFC Bank, Near Jwalaheri Market, Paschim Vihar, New Delhi-110063. +91 11 355 27184 +91 89298 55558 care@pathocity.in pathocity.in/ Make an appointment See what we provide for your health Doctor Consultation Blood Test Histopathology X RAY ECG EEG View More facilities Google Reviews Best pathology lab in the area! They provide high-quality services at reasonable prices. The tests are thorough, and the reports are reliable. Will definitely come back if needed. Kunal Raj Dr. Vaibhav is our family pathologist now :)
He is quite amazing. He and his team ofcourse do the blood work and analysis but he goes an extra mile to guide us on various aspects, including which test we may need or not need. Shilpa Uttam Dr Vaibhav and his team are experts and manage the blood collection process pain free and conveniently. Recommended to everyone 👍 Samarth Bhatia Dr Vaibhav Girotra is an excellent doctor, the reports are accurate and we get our whole family health check up done from him. As he provides report consultation after testing. God bless him. Simi verma Really impressed with the service! The staff was gentle, the process was smooth, and I received my reports much earlier than expected. Nishita Khanna Samples were collected on time and quickly. Reports were shared by the evening in the same day. Consultation took place the next day by Dr. Vaibhav and he explained the diagnosis wonderfully and in easy to understand terms. Vaibhav Mudgal I have had a very good experience with Dr. Vaibhav's pathology as the staff is soo kind and they reply to your queries promptly.
Keep up the good work! Manisha Yadav Super service from this very exclusive path lab. Post results one gets advice from a senior doctor- Dr. Girotra as well. Trained staff visits for sample collection before the scheduled time. Service level is beyond expectation.
